mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_i18n_resource (resource_key, language, resource_value, resource_type, template_id, field_name, tenant_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{resourceKey}, #{language}, #{resourceValue}, #{resourceType}, #{templateId}, #{fieldName}, #{tenantId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE form_i18n_resource SET resource_value = #{resourceValue}, resource_type = #{resourceType}, template_id = #{templateId}, field_name = #{fieldName}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE resource_key = #{resourceKey} AND language = #{language} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, resource_key, language, resource_value, resource_type, template_id, field_name, tenant_id, created_at, updated_at FROM form_i18n_resource WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY language, resource_key

SELECT id, resource_key, language, resource_value, resource_type, template_id, field_name, tenant_id, created_at, updated_at FROM form_i18n_resource WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND language = #{language} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY resource_key
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM form_i18n_resource WHERE resource_key = #{resourceKey} AND language = #{language} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
DELETE FROM form_i18n_resource WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
